mapper.select: select * from ( (select distinct a.organizationClassify as typeValue,'organizationClassify' as type,b.codeid as sortValue from () a left join v_classify_info b on a.organizationClassify = b.codetext ) union all select distinct platformType as typeValue,'platformType' as type ,platformType as sortValue from () union all select distinct projectName as typeValue,'projectName' as type,projectName as sortValue from () union all select distinct updateType as typeValue,'updateType' as type,updateType as sortValue from () union all select distinct partition as typeValue,'partition' as type,partition as sortValue from () ) order by sortValue

select UNSTRUCTED_DATA as unstructedData,TWOHANDLE as twoHandle,TEXTHANDLE as textHandle, WORKFLOW_USED as workflowUsed,APPLICATION_USED as applicationUsed,ZHUTIKU_USED as zhutikuUsed, ZIYUANKU_USED as ziyuankuUsed,YAOSUKU_USED as yaosukuUsed,TAG_USED as tagUsed, VAL_DENSITY as valDensity from table_organization_val_density where upper(TABLE_NAME_EN) = upper(#{queryParams.tableNameEn,jdbcType=VARCHAR}) and upper(TABLE_TYPE) = upper(#{queryParams.platformType,jdbcType=VARCHAR}) and upper(TABLE_PROJECT) = upper(#{queryParams.tableProject,jdbcType=VARCHAR})
mapper.update: update table_organization_val_density set UNSTRUCTED_DATA = #{density.unstructedData,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, TWOHANDLE = #{density.twoHandle,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, textHandle = #{density.textHandle,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, WORKFLOW_USED = #{density.workflowUsed,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, APPLICATION_USED = #{density.applicationUsed,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, ZHUTIKU_USED = #{density.zhutikuUsed,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, ZIYUANKU_USED = #{density.ziyuankuUsed,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, YAOSUKU_USED = #{density.yaosukuUsed,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, TAG_USED = #{density.tagUsed,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, VAL_DENSITY = #{density.valDensity,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, UPDATE_VAL_DENSITY_STATUS = 1 where upper(TABLE_NAME_EN) = upper(#{queryParams.tableNameEn,jdbcType=VARCHAR}) and upper(TABLE_TYPE) = upper(#{queryParams.platformType,jdbcType=VARCHAR}) and upper(TABLE_PROJECT) = upper(#{queryParams.tableProject,jdbcType=VARCHAR})
mapper.select:
select count(1) as num,PRIMARY_ORGANIZATION_CH as classify from TABLE_ORGANIZATION_ASSETS where STATISTICS_TIME> DATE_TRUNC('day', CURRENT_DATE) and PRIMARY_ORGANIZATION_CH in ('主题库','资源库','业务要素索引库')
and
(upper(table_name_en) = upper(#{item.tableNameEn,jdbcType=VARCHAR}) and upper(table_project) = upper(#{item.tableProject,jdbcType=VARCHAR}))
group by PRIMARY_ORGANIZATION_CH

select TABLE_NAME_EN as tableNameEn,TABLE_TYPE as tableType, TABLE_PROJECT as tableProject, PRIMARY_ORGANIZATION_CH as primaryOrganizationCh, SECONDARY_ORGANIZATION_CH as secondaryOrganizationCh from TABLE_ORGANIZATION_ASSETS where STATISTICS_TIME > DATE_TRUNC('day', CURRENT_DATE)

select PRIMARY_ORGANIZATION_CH,SECONDARY_ORGANIZATION_CH from TABLE_ORGANIZATION_ASSETS where STATISTICS_TIME > DATE_TRUNC('day', CURRENT_DATE) and upper(TABLE_NAME_EN) = upper(#{queryParams.tableNameEn,jdbcType=VARCHAR}) and upper(TABLE_TYPE) = upper(#{queryParams.platformType,jdbcType=VARCHAR}) and upper(TABLE_PROJECT) = upper(#{queryParams.tableProject,jdbcType=VARCHAR})
mapper.update: merge into ZC_CONFIG_FIELD_CONTROL a using (select 'TABLE_LIFECYCLE' as NAME, #{userName,jdbcType=VARCHAR} as USERNAME ) b on (a.name = b.name and a.USERNAME = b.USERNAME) when matched then update set SHOW_FIELD_LIST = #{lifeCycleShowFields,jdbcType=VARCHAR} where NAME = 'TABLE_LIFECYCLE' and USERNAME = #{userName,jdbcType=VARCHAR} when not matched then insert values('TABLE_LIFECYCLE',90,#{lifeCycleShowFields,jdbcType=VARCHAR},#{userName,jdbcType=VARCHAR})
mapper.select: select SHOW_FIELD_LIST from ZC_CONFIG_FIELD_CONTROL where NAME='TABLE_LIFECYCLE' and USERNAME = #{userName,jdbcType=VARCHAR}
